properties.description: Additional filter that prunes any entity stages from the config based on the set of failed entity stages from the previous batch

source:
from odw.core.orchestration.dependency_resolver import DependencyResolver
from odw.core.etl.metadata_manager import MetadataManager
from odw.core.util.logging_util import LoggingUtil
from typing import List, Dict, Any
import json

# For convenience
removed_elements = [
    x
    for x in config_batch
    if x not in filtered_config_batch
]
print("The following entity stages were filtered out because dependent stages have failed")
print(json.dumps(removed_elements, indent=4))
